mapper.select: SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM_MASTER WHERE INSTRUCTOR_ID = #{instructorId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM_MASTER WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
SELECT DETAIL_ID, CURRICULUM_ID, ROW_ORDER, WEEK_INFO, TOPIC, CONTENT, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM_DETAIL WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} ORDER BY ROW_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CURRICULUM_MASTER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CURRICULUM_MASTER ( CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId}, #{title}, #{instructorId}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO CURRICULUM_DETAIL ( DETAIL_ID, CURRICULUM_ID, ROW_ORDER, WEEK_INFO, TOPIC, CONTENT, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( SEQ_CURRICULUM_DETAIL.NEXTVAL, #{curriculumId}, #{rowOrder}, #{weekInfo}, #{topic}, #{content}, #{rgtrId}, SYSDATE, NULL, SYSDATE )
